title: Fast Golden Carrot Crafting
body:
### 🥕 Fast Golden Carrot Crafting🥕 

Makes golden carrot crating cheaper by using golden ingot instead of nuggets.
Crafting is shapeless, and possible in inverory without crafting table.

Recipe is shown below:

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e86b3d8d3d25f6548a0234d7ceafd84e9983d8a5.png)
